relayChannels.label: Output A
relayChannels.gate: Shield routing plus relay trigger voltage, current, polarity, and isolation must be verified before wiring.

relayChannels.label: Output B
relayChannels.gate: Shield routing plus relay trigger voltage, current, polarity, and isolation must be verified before wiring.

relayChannels.gate: Shield routing plus relay trigger voltage, current, polarity, and isolation must be verified before wiring.

relayChannels.label: Output D
relayChannels.gate: Shield routing plus relay trigger voltage, current, polarity, and isolation must be verified before wiring.

constructionSequence.title: Board and shield inspection
constructionSequence.summary: Record the active single power source, jumper state, rail checks, and shield continuity before any external module is connected.

constructionSequence.title: Relay input proof
constructionSequence.summary: Keep contacts disconnected while trigger polarity, input current, 3.3 V behavior, and JD-VCC/VCC behavior are verified.

constructionSequence.title: XBee read-only discovery
constructionSequence.summary: Use the USB adapter as a PC dock for identity and serial discovery only; setting writes and ESP32 wiring remain gated.

constructionSequence.title: Qualified load review
constructionSequence.summary: Treat load or mains work as a review package, not a public wiring procedure.

safetyGates.title: Mains work blocked
safetyGates.summary: No step-by-step mains wiring instructions are published, and the public materials are not a qualified electrical review.

safetyGates.title: Relay contacts blocked
safetyGates.summary: Relay load wiring waits for trigger polarity, input current, voltage compatibility, and isolation verification.

safetyGates.title: XBee writes blocked
safetyGates.summary: The radio path starts with read-only discovery; setting writes require later owner review and explicit approval.

futureTracks: Confirm repository Pages source is set to GitHub Actions before public deployment.
Review the build-script allowlist before adding any file to the public artifact.
Close hardware blockers before firmware flashing, relay switching, XBee setting writes, or mains/load wiring.
Keep future generated screenshots, raw uploads, vendor PDFs, and bulky binaries out of the public Pages artifact.
